testcase.name: runScenario["Add product to cart", "Cart Functionality"](1)

failure.message: ❌ Product was not found in the cart after adding expected [true] but found [false]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: ❌ Product was not found in the cart after adding expected [true] but found [false] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:1578) at org.testng.Assert.assertTrue(Assert.java:57) at stepdefinitions.CartSteps.product_should_appear_in_cart(CartSteps.java:29) at ✽.Product should appear in cart(file:///Users/ranajitchowdhury/eclipse-workspace/QaBrainsAutomation_Final/src/test/resources/features/CartCheckout.feature:10)
testcase.system-out: @smoke @regression Scenario: Add product to cart # src/test/resources/features/CartCheckout.feature:7 Application launched Given User launches the application # stepdefinitions.CommonSteps.user_launches_the_application() When User adds products to cart # stepdefinitions.CartSteps.user_adds_products_to_cart() Then Product should appear in cart # stepdefinitions.CartSteps.product_should_appear_in_cart() java.lang.AssertionError: ❌ Product was not found in the cart after adding expected [true] but found [false] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:1578) at org.testng.Assert.assertTrue(Assert.java:57) at stepdefinitions.CartSteps.product_should_appear_in_cart(CartSteps.java:29) at ✽.Product should appear in cart(file:///Users/ranajitchowdhury/eclipse-workspace/QaBrainsAutomation_Final/src/test/resources/features/CartCheckout.feature:10)
testcase.system-err: [main] INFO io.github.bonigarcia.wdm.WebDriverManager - Using chromedriver 146.0.7680.165 (resolved driver for Chrome 146) [main] INFO io.github.bonigarcia.wdm.WebDriverManager - Exporting webdriver.chrome.driver as /Users/ranajitchowdhury/.cache/selenium/chromedriver/mac64/146.0.7680.165/chromedriver Apr 07, 2026 4:48:31 PM org.openqa.selenium.devtools.CdpVersionFinder findNearestMatch WARNING: Unable to find CDP implementation matching 146 Apr 07, 2026 4:48:31 PM org.openqa.selenium.chromium.ChromiumDriver lambda$new$5 WARNING: Unable to find version of CDP to use for 146.0.7680.178. You may need to include a dependency on a specific version of the CDP using something similar to `org.seleniumhq.selenium:selenium-devtools-v86:4.25.0` where the version ("v86") matches the version of the chromium-based browser you're using and the version number of the artifact is the same as Selenium's.

testcase.name: runScenario["Remove product from cart", "Cart Functionality"](2)
testcase.system-out: @smoke @regression Scenario: Remove product from cart # src/test/resources/features/CartCheckout.feature:13 Application launched Given User launches the application # stepdefinitions.CommonSteps.user_launches_the_application() When User adds products to cart # stepdefinitions.CartSteps.user_adds_products_to_cart() And User removes product from cart # stepdefinitions.CartSteps.user_removes_product_from_cart() Then Cart should be empty # stepdefinitions.CartSteps.cart_should_be_empty()

testcase.name: runScenario["Registered user can reset password", "Forgot Password functionality"](3)
testcase.system-out: @smoke @regression @ForgotPassword Scenario: Registered user can reset password # src/test/resources/features/ForgotPassword.feature:4 Given User is on Forgot Password page # stepdefinitions.ForgotPasswordSteps.userIsOnForgotPasswordPage() When User enters registered email "rezaulkarimqa25@gmail.com" # stepdefinitions.ForgotPasswordSteps.userEntersRegisteredEmail(java.lang.String) And User clicks on Submit button # stepdefinitions.ForgotPasswordSteps.userClicksOnSubmitButton() Then User should see success message "Password is reset successfully" # stepdefinitions.ForgotPasswordSteps.userShouldSeeSuccessMessage(java.lang.String)
testcase.system-err: [main] INFO io.github.bonigarcia.wdm.WebDriverManager - Using chromedriver 146.0.7680.165 (resolved driver for Chrome 146) [main] INFO io.github.bonigarcia.wdm.WebDriverManager - Exporting webdriver.chrome.driver as /Users/ranajitchowdhury/.cache/selenium/chromedriver/mac64/146.0.7680.165/chromedriver Apr 07, 2026 4:49:59 PM org.openqa.selenium.devtools.CdpVersionFinder findNearestMatch WARNING: Unable to find CDP implementation matching 146 Apr 07, 2026 4:49:59 PM org.openqa.selenium.chromium.ChromiumDriver lambda$new$5 WARNING: Unable to find version of CDP to use for 146.0.7680.178. You may need to include a dependency on a specific version of the CDP using something similar to `org.seleniumhq.selenium:selenium-devtools-v86:4.25.0` where the version ("v86") matches the version of the chromium-based browser you're using and the version number of the artifact is the same as Selenium's.

testcase.name: runScenario["Unregistered user cannot reset password", "Forgot Password functionality"](4)
testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: expected [true] but found [false] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:1578) at org.testng.Assert.assertTrue(Assert.java:57) at org.testng.Assert.assertTrue(Assert.java:67) at stepdefinitions.ForgotPasswordSteps.userShouldSeeErrorMessage(ForgotPasswordSteps.java:53) at ✽.User should see error message "Please include an '@' sign in the email address.'rezaulkarimgmail.com' is missing an'@'."(file:///Users/ranajitchowdhury/eclipse-workspace/QaBrainsAutomation_Final/src/test/resources/features/ForgotPassword.feature:15)
testcase.system-out: @regression @ForgotPassword Scenario: Unregistered user cannot reset password # src/test/resources/features/ForgotPassword.feature:11 Given User is on Forgot Password page # stepdefinitions.ForgotPasswordSteps.userIsOnForgotPasswordPage() When User enters unregistered email "rezaulkarimqa25gmail.com" # stepdefinitions.ForgotPasswordSteps.userEntersUnregisteredEmail(java.lang.String) And User clicks on Submit button # stepdefinitions.ForgotPasswordSteps.userClicksOnSubmitButton() Then User should see error message "Please include an '@' sign in the email address.'rezaulkarimgmail.com' is missing an'@'." # stepdefinitions.ForgotPasswordSteps.userShouldSeeErrorMessage(java.lang.String) java.lang.AssertionError: expected [true] but found [false] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:1578) at org.testng.Assert.assertTrue(Assert.java:57) at org.testng.Assert.assertTrue(Assert.java:67) at stepdefinitions.ForgotPasswordSteps.userShouldSeeErrorMessage(ForgotPasswordSteps.java:53) at ✽.User should see error message "Please include an '@' sign in the email address.'rezaulkarimgmail.com' is missing an'@'."(file:///Users/ranajitchowdhury/eclipse-workspace/QaBrainsAutomation_Final/src/test/resources/features/ForgotPassword.feature:15)

testcase.name: runScenario["Login with valid credentials", "Login Functionality"](5)
testcase.system-out: @smoke @regression @Login Scenario: Login with valid credentials # src/test/resources/features/Login.feature:7 Application launched Given User launches the application # stepdefinitions.CommonSteps.user_launches_the_application() When User enters valid username and password # stepdefinitions.LoginSteps.user_enters_valid_username_and_password() ✅ Success Message: Congratulations. You have successfully logged in. When you are done click logout below. ✅ Login Success Status: true Then User should be logged in successfully # stepdefinitions.LoginSteps.user_should_be_logged_in_successfully()

testcase.name: runScenario["Login with invalid credentials", "Login Functionality"](6)
testcase.system-out: @regression @Login Scenario: Login with invalid credentials # src/test/resources/features/Login.feature:13 Application launched Given User launches the application # stepdefinitions.CommonSteps.user_launches_the_application() When User enters invalid username and password # stepdefinitions.LoginSteps.user_enters_invalid_username_and_password() 🔴 Error Message: Your email and password both are invalid! 🔴 Error Display Status: true Then Error message should be displayed # stepdefinitions.LoginSteps.error_message_should_be_displayed()

testcase.name: runScenario["Logged in user should be able to logout", "Logout Functionality"](7)
testcase.system-out: @smoke @regression @Logout Scenario: Logged in user should be able to logout # src/test/resources/features/Logout.feature:4 Application launched Given User launches the application # stepdefinitions.CommonSteps.user_launches_the_application() ✅ Success Message: Congratulations. You have successfully logged in. When you are done click logout below. And User is logged in # stepdefinitions.LogoutSteps.user_is_logged_in() When User clicks on logout button # stepdefinitions.LogoutSteps.user_clicks_on_logout_button() Then User should be logged out successfully # stepdefinitions.LogoutSteps.user_should_be_logged_out_successfully()

testcase.name: runScenario["User should be able to register successfully with a valid email", "User Registration"](8)
testcase.system-out: @smoke @regression @Registration Scenario: User should be able to register successfully with a valid email # src/test/resources/features/Registration.feature:8 Application launched Given User launches the application # stepdefinitions.CommonSteps.user_launches_the_application() User is on homepage And User is on homepage # stepdefinitions.CommonSteps.user_is_on_homepage() When User navigates to registration page # stepdefinitions.RegistrationSteps.user_navigates_to_registration_page() And User enters valid registration details with email "rezaulkarimqa25@gmail.com" # stepdefinitions.RegistrationSteps.user_enters_valid_registration_details_with_email(java.lang.String) And User clicks on register button # stepdefinitions.RegistrationSteps.user_clicks_on_register_button() Then User should be registered successfully # stepdefinitions.RegistrationSteps.user_should_be_registered_successfully()

testcase.name: runScenario["User should not be able to register with invalid email", "User Registration"](9)
testcase.system-out: @regression @Registration Scenario: User should not be able to register with invalid email # src/test/resources/features/Registration.feature:15 Application launched Given User launches the application # stepdefinitions.CommonSteps.user_launches_the_application() User is on homepage And User is on homepage # stepdefinitions.CommonSteps.user_is_on_homepage() When User navigates to registration page # stepdefinitions.RegistrationSteps.user_navigates_to_registration_page() And User enters registration details with email "rezaulkarimqa25gmail.com" # stepdefinitions.RegistrationSteps.user_enters_registration_details_with_email(java.lang.String) And User clicks on register button # stepdefinitions.RegistrationSteps.user_clicks_on_register_button() Then Email validation error message should be displayed # stepdefinitions.RegistrationSteps.email_validation_error_message_should_be_displayed()

testcase.name: runScenario["R-01 Add multiple products to cart", "Regression Test Suite"](10)
testcase.system-out: @regression Scenario: R-01 Add multiple products to cart # src/test/resources/features/RegressionTests.feature:3 Application launched Given User launches the application # stepdefinitions.CommonSteps.user_launches_the_application() When User adds products to cart # stepdefinitions.CartSteps.user_adds_products_to_cart() Products added successfully Then Products should be added successfully # stepdefinitions.CommonSteps.products_should_be_added_successfully()
